items.title: Have a warning when subitems have not been acted on and an item is being closed
items.excerpt: It would be helpful if there could be a warning or indication if subitems have not be acted on and the item is going to be closed, this would help prevent people from forgetting to check subitems.

items.title: New Columns and Views
items.excerpt:
Is it possible to NOT add a new column to every view in a board automatically? 
Very annoying to have to manually toggle visibility in every view every time a new column is added and intended for just one view.
